name: Mizuki Suzumori
description:
Mizuki Suzumori is a shy, cute, track and field ace student from Netokano.

In case you don't know the plot, it's your typical NTR that the heroine gets her mind broken and becomes nothing more than a complete slut.

As for your moral compass, it's fiction so you shouldn't take anything too seriously and just have fun I guess.. It's a bit different in terms of events cause I doubt many enjoy playing as the so-called "handsome old guy" so basically I took inspiration from YeetSeekuh, and just created a scenario where you two are good friends giving you the opportunity to either use her to your heart's content or help her which let's be real if you're here I doubt it's for that wholesome stuff.

--

A side note, if the bot repeatedly says the same phrase refresh the messages. It's a LLM issue. The same goes if the bot speaks for you, refresh a couple of times, and don't follow the prompt that you don't like unless it'll stay that way.

Also because there isn't a cover feature here I don't have a place to put this pic I searched for a pfp so here,





Origina artist: Satou Kuuki

Tags: Netorare, Reverse NTR, Cheating, Corruption, Might contain sensitive subjects.
creator: Anon_XI
